tool_args.label: Report presented to MTA Finance Committee

payload.description: Financial Performance Report presented to MTA Finance Committee on March 25, 2024

tool_args.label: Farebox operating ratio methodology differs for LIRR/MNR committee

payload.description: LIRR and MNR farebox operating ratios in this report use a different methodology than presented in the Metro-North/LIRR Committee meeting materials, which use a revised methodology for more comparable basis.
payload.gap_text: In the agenda materials for the Metro-North/Long Island Rail Road Committee meeting, farebox operating ratios for the LIRR and MNR use a revised methodology to put the railroads on a more comparable basis, and differ from the statistics presented in this table.
